summary: Critical pre-event testing completed for SSNC Speed Networking PWA (520+ users). All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully. The app is ready for event day.
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin/login with admin@ssnc.com / admin123 - SUCCESS
Admin dashboard loads with stats: 520 users, 1 event, 31 categories, 2 volunteers
Admin Events page shows SBC Speed Networking 2026 with 520 registered
Event detail tabs: Registrations (Badge # column, Assign Badges, Download CSV), Seating (Assign Tables with progress, Download CSV), WhatsApp (Send Welcome, Send Assignments)
Event seating shows 520 Registered, 520 Seated (Round 1), 66 Tables, 3 Rounds, 'All users assigned' badge
Admin Settings page loads with sponsor heading, sponsor titles, sponsor names fields
User login at /login with phone 7874949091 - SUCCESS (phone-only, no password)
User dashboard loads showing table assignments (Round 1: Table 63, Round 2: Table 62, Round 3: Table 62)
User Pass References page shows 3 rounds with table numbers
Reference form requires contact_name and contact_phone (submit button disabled without them)
Volunteer login at /volunteer/login with phone 9876543210 / password a@a.com - SUCCESS
Volunteer dashboard shows QR Scanner with event selector and Camera Scan option
Live screen at /live loads in light mode (rgb(246,247,249) background)
Live screen shows sponsor boxes with 'TECH SPONSORS' heading, Rapid Express Technologies and SGCCI SBC logos
Live screen shows Total References, Attendance, Timer, and 3 leaderboard sections
Public profile at /profile/{user_id} loads with name, business, category badges, QR code, Save Contact button
QR code endpoint at /api/public/qr/{user_id} returns image ~90KB (>25KB requirement)
All API endpoints return proper responses (no 500 errors)
Frontend has no compilation errors or console errors on any page
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 520 users and event data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical pre-event testing completed. All auth flows work (admin email+password, user phone-only, volunteer phone+password, live screen password). Event has 520 registered users with seating assignments across 66 tables and 3 rounds. Live screen uses light theme with sponsor boxes. QR codes generate ~90KB images with noise technique. Reference form enforces required fields (contact_name, contact_phone). All admin event management tabs working (Registrations with Badge #, Seating with Assign Tables progress bar, WhatsApp broadcast). App is production-ready for event day.
